name: fetch-profile
description: Fetches a customer profile from Tealium Moments API.

attributeId.description: The ID or name of the visitor attribute used as the lookup key (e.g. email attribute ID).

attributeValue.description: The value to look up in Tealium (e.g. the visitor's email address).

includeContext.description: Whether to fetch the profile context; if false, the tool returns a consent-respecting message instead of profile data.

profileApiUrl.description: Full Tealium Moments API URL for the profile endpoint to call.
